{{CargoClone
|name=Touda
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=148
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} FAME +50
|gene3=Refine +1 White Demon God Material +3%
|gene4=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=For Round 1, CRIT rate +1.5%
|gene6=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=For Round 1, CRIT rate +2.5%
|}}
